name: Victor · Nguyễn Văn Thắng
title: About Me
bio1: I am a Full-stack Developer with 1 year of freelance experience building web applications and backend systems. I work with React, Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL to deliver end-to-end solutions — from responsive UIs to RESTful APIs and database design. Comfortable taking ownership of features and working independently.
bio2: Based in Ho Chi Minh City, I focus on turning requirements into reliable software. I have delivered 3 freelance projects including a social learning platform, a debt management system, and a developer portfolio. Previously completed academic projects in distributed systems and software engineering.
pillar1_desc: Building responsive web applications with React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Designing RESTful APIs and managing the full development lifecycle.
pillar2_desc: Containerizing applications with Docker, configuring API Gateways (Kong), and deploying to cloud platforms. Foundational knowledge of microservices architecture.
pillar3_desc: Writing clean, maintainable code, conducting thorough testing (Jest), using version control (Git/GitHub), and automating workflows with CI/CD pipelines.
